summary: System / DevOps / SRE engineer with experience across Linux operations, cloud and on-premise infrastructure, Kubernetes, CI/CD, observability, and infrastructure automation.

highlights: Worked in a Linux terminal environment.
Built and maintained a Rocky Linux based Amazon Machine Image for EC2 using Packer.
Maintained AWS and on-premise infrastructure within the Taiwan engineering team using Git-based infrastructure as code workflows with Terraform, Terragrunt, and Atlantis.
Assisted in reviewing and validating existing technical documentation and infrastructure processes, identifying inconsistencies across regions.
Maintained system initialization automation with Ansible for Linux configuration, Java runtime, Nginx, RabbitMQ, and NFS setup.
Built and maintained Jenkins CI/CD pipelines using Groovy scripts for Taiwan engineering workflows.
Managed bastion host and internal asset tracking services based on Consul and Golang services, integrating EC2 metadata into centralized access control.
Analyzed system resource utilization and performance metrics through Prometheus and Grafana to identify infrastructure bottlenecks and propose optimization solutions.
Maintained the observability stack built around Prometheus, Grafana, and Consul.

experience.role: System / Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) / DevOps Engineering
highlights: Worked in a Linux terminal environment.
Participated in on-call rotations about one week per month and troubleshot production issues with team members.
Supported a cryptocurrency exchange platform on AWS and on-premise infrastructure.
Administered Kubernetes clusters on AWS and on-premise environments.
Managed AWS and Cloudflare infrastructure with Pulumi and Ansible.
Administered CI/CD pipelines with GitLab CI and Jenkins.

experience.role: Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) / DevOps / Cloud Engineering
highlights: Worked in a Linux terminal environment.
Participated in on-call rotations and troubleshooting with team members.
Developed a Python automation project for web monitoring.
Developed a streaming platform project based on GCP GKE and Aliyun ACK.
Managed cloud infrastructure across AWS, GCP, Aliyun, and Cloudflare with JumpServer.
Administered Kubernetes clusters on AWS EKS, GCP GKE, and Aliyun ACK.
Administered CI/CD pipelines with GitLab CI, Jenkins, and Tekton.
Completed an intensive hands-on training program covering web development fundamentals, system programming, Linux environments, networking basics, and IoT system integration.
Built an IoT monitoring system named IndoorAirBox using Raspberry Pi and ESP8266 for temperature and humidity data collection.

highlights: Built infrastructure with Proxmox VE to support personal Linux lab environments.
